title: Adaptive identification method for simulation and control of glass melting process
author: Byrski Witold
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Adaptive identification method based on modulating functions method is described in the paper. The process is treated as a linear system with parameters values that can be changed on-line during the identification procedure. The overall model is composed of several submodels. The models, which inputs can be controlled, are aproximated by the the Strejc transfer function. This approach allows to reduce the number of model parameters. Moreover, many dedicated PID auto-tuning methods can be adapted. The  developed procedure was applied for the data collected from a real glass production installation.
